wallets_description: Pali zikwama zambiri za Bitcoin zomwe zimasiyana m'njira zofunika. Mutha kudziwa ngati chikwama ndi choyenera kwa inu pofunsa mafunso osavuta awa.
wallets_s1_c1: Zikwama za Bitcoin zimagwirizana, choncho mutha kutumiza Bitcoin kwa aliyense mosasamala za chikwama chomwe akugwiritsa ntchito.
wallets_s1_c2: Pali zikwama zambiri za Bitcoin zomwe zimasiyana m'njira zofunika. Mutha kudziwa ngati chikwama ndi choyenera kwa inu pofunsa mafunso osavuta awa:
wallets_s2_c1: Chimodzi mwa zatsopano za Bitcoin ndi kuthekera kosungira popanda kudalira wosunga, monga banki.
wallets_s2_c2: Ngati mukusunga bitcoin pa exchange kapena mu ETF, mumatayirira ufulu wa bitcoin.
wallets_s2_c3: Zikwama zokusunga wekha zimatsegula mphamvu yonse ya Bitcoin: ndalama zaufulu.
wallets_s2_c4: Ndi chikwama chokusunga wekha, ndinu nokha amene ali ndi kuthekera kogwiritsa ntchito kapena kutumiza ndalama zanu. Palibe amene angakuletseni kutumiza kapena kulandira ndalama zanu mukagwiritsa ntchito chikwama chokusunga wekha.
wallets_s2_c5: Zikwama zokusunga wekha zimatchedwanso zikwama zopanda wosunga.
wallets_s3_c1: Zikwama za wosunga ndi zikwama zomwe simuli ndi ulamuliro wa ndalama zanu.
wallets_s3_c2: Zikwama izi zimafanana kwambiri ndi dongosolo la mabanki pomwe mukuyenera kukhulupirira wina kukulolezani kupeza ndalama zanu. Ngati Bitcoin yanu ili pa exchange, mukugwiritsa ntchito chikwama cha wosunga.
wallets_s3_c3: Ngati munagula Bitcoin ETF, mukugwiritsa ntchito chikwama cha wosunga chomwe sichimakuthandizani kuchotsa ku kusunga wekha.
wallets_s3_c4: Zikwama za wosunga zingaoneke zosavuta, koma wosungayo ali ndi kuthekera ka teknikaili kuba ndalama zonse za ogwiritsa ntchito nthawi iliyonse.
wallets_s3_c5: Makiyi anu osati, ndalama zanu osati!
wallets_s4_c1: Zikwama zozizira zimasunga makiyi a Bitcoin yanu munjira yomwe sidzawaoneseratu pa intaneti.
wallets_s4_c2: Izi zimachepetsa kwambiri njira zomwe mbala ingathe kugwiritsa ntchito kuyesa kuba Bitcoin yanu, ndipo ndi zabwino kwambiri kwa ndalama zambiri za Bitcoin zomwe simukufunika kutumiza kawirikawiri.
wallets_s4_c3: Mutha kuganizira za chikwama chozizira ngati akaunti yosungira ndalama kwa nthawi yaitali, yotchedwanso kusunga chozizira.
wallets_s5_c1: Zikwama zotentha zimasunga makiyi a Bitcoin yanu pa chipangizo chomwe chili pa intaneti, monga foni yanu.
wallets_s5_c2: Zikwama zotentha nthawi zambiri zimaonedwa ngati zotetezeka, koma zingakhale ndi ziwopsezo zambiri kuposa zikwama zozizira.
wallets_s5_c3: Mutha kuganizira za chikwama chotentha ngati chikwama chooneka. Simungasunga ndalama zanu zonse mu chikwama chanu, koma mungasunge ndalama zogwiritsira ntchito.
wallets_s5_c4: Zikwama zotentha zimapangitsa kukhala kosavuta kwambiri kugwiritsa ntchito Bitcoin yanu popanda kuchotsa ndalama zanu zonse ku kusungidwa kwachozizira.
wallets_s6_c1: Mukakonza chikwama chanu cha Bitcoin, chipangizo chanu chidzapanga mawu obwezeretsa. Mawu obwezeretsa awa (omwe amatchedwa mawu oyambirira) ali ndi mawu 12 kapena 24.
wallets_s6_c2: Ngati mutayirira mwayi wopeza chikwama chanu kapena chipangizo chanu chiimirira kugwira ntchito, mutha kulowa mawu obwezeretsa awa mu chikwama chatsopano kuti mupeze Bitcoin yanu.
wallets_s6_c3: Zikwama zambiri zimaphatikiza pepala lolemba mawu anu obwezeretsa, koma anthu ambiri amakonda kusunga mawu awa pa chitsulo. Izi zimapangitsa kukhala kosatheka kutayirira mawu anu obwezeretsa pagwa masoka achilengedwe monga moto kapena chigumula.
wallets_s6_c4: Jameson Lopp wayesa zipangizo 70 zosunga pa chitsulo kuti akuthandizeni kusankha choyenera kwa inu.
wallets_s6_c5: Onani gaidi ya Jameson ya kusungira Bitcoin pa chitsulo pano.
wallets_s6_c6: Kapena pitirizani kumavina kuti mufufuze zikwama za Bitcoin.
wallets_cta_lightning: Mukufunafuna Gaidi yathu ya Zikwama za Lightning?
